nasb.text: Your bow was made bare, The rods of chastisement were sworn. Selah. You cleaved the earth with rivers.

esv.text: You stripped the sheath from your bow, calling for many arrows.  Selah You split the earth with rivers.

cnv.text: 你的弓顯露，你的箭上弦。 你裂開大地為江河。

ccb.text: 你拿出弓，要射出许多箭羽。（细拉） 你以江河分开大地。
